study.title: Recover and study The Mender of the Lost Company at a Research Pedestal

grant.title: Discipline learned: The Mender of the Lost Company

title.text: The Mender of the Lost Company

subtitle.text: Bring back what the war took.

description: The greatest kill is behind you. What remains is the company you lost getting here.
The mender's art summons allies, repairs the broken, and refuses to let the fallen stay fallen.
→ Recover and study the Mender of the Lost Company at a Research Pedestal.
